notes: Gemini CLI maintains a single-session task list via the write_todos tool (full-list replace; each item {description,status} where status is pending|in_progress|completed, one in_progress max). Driver asks gemini to track three items and walk each pending→in_progress→completed in one session. The lifecycle arc (ready→working→ready) and SubagentCount=0 are observable and asserted as phases. KNOWN FAILING: the load-bearing tasks-content observable — three items in the session API tasks field with matching subjects + status — is NOT produced because the geminicli parser routes the write_todos toolCall through the generic function_call path and emits no TaskDelta (the local transcript trace exists and carries the todos[] snapshot, so this is a parser bug, not architectural incapability). The spec asserts the CORRECT behavior; record files the issue and records known_failing. RECORDING PREREQ: write_todos is registered only on gemini-2 models, so recording forces GEMINI_MODEL=gemini-2.5-pro (the driver forwards it as -m). CONFIRMED 2026-06-12: the API key IS served gemini-2.5-pro (not zero-quota), and the live recording shows 7 write_todos toolCalls in the transcript carrying args.todos[] snapshots while events.jsonl emits ZERO TaskDelta — confirming the parser bug. The 5 encoded lifecycle phases (ready->working->ready, SubagentCount=0) all PASS; only the non-phase-encoded tasks-content observable is missing (known_failing).

text: Session appears in ready (first phase anchored UNPINNED to start so a transient proc-<PID> presession can't steal birth)
PID bound shortly after launch (cwd harvested from the transcript bootstrap <session_context>)
User prompt drives the session ready → working

invariants: no state_transition to waiting for session
no state_transition to ready for session
text: Session stays working across the write_todos calls — the tool auto-executes under gemini -y (no permission gate), so no waiting fires and no premature ready dip; no child sessions spawn (SubagentCount stays 0)
Final assistant message with text and no further toolCalls drives the inferred turn_done working → ready; final session state is ready; no child sessions were spawned
